textByHash.9e15bec1ce6af3f40d5932a159ffd202a9573c6c: Who goes there? Friend or foe?
textByHash.f40898b6ad93dbcdd88084b3f707e0d35550054e: Yanille is on the southwest border of Kandarin, Beyond here you go into the Feldip hills which is major Ogre territory. Our job is to defend Yanille from the ogres.
